rationale.GGGZNWZD: High risk hint (5.00) and significant negative changes in both activity (-35.00) and sleep (-47.00) averages.
rationale.QOHAQRQI: High risk hint (5.00) and significant negative changes in both activity (-33.00) and sleep (-49.00) averages.

failure_modes: False positives due to short-term fluctuations.
Missing individuals with gradual well-being decline not reflected in large delta values.
Bias towards individuals with higher initial activity and sleep averages.
guardrails: Cross-validate findings with other available data sources (if any).
Consider age and location when interpreting activity and sleep patterns.
Implement a feedback loop to refine the detection criteria over time.
planner_result.strategy: The LLM will prioritize candidates with high risk hints and significant negative changes in activity and sleep averages, indicating potential well-being decline. The deterministic features will be used to support the LLM's decision-making process. Given the low budget profile, the LLM will focus on the top candidates based on the risk hints and delta values.
